sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong gum Topa Betlen khua hong suak a,
Bawng an neekna kuang sung kisial zota;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Maw lamdang nuamna a minpha mahmah

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kei’ mawhna tang dingin si zota;
a lamdang keima lung a damta,
Kei tang ding hong si hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Huang sung pan lamkhial tuute a zongta;
Sau veipi damtakin a hong sam hi,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh vantung pan hong pai kik ding hi,
Kum tampi kheng zo hih thu ka um
Van pan hong kumsuk ke’n ka mu ding hi,
Kei a ding hong kum hi.
